title: Giant Couscous & Aubergine Salad
summary: Big balsamic energy. Using our jammy Aubergine Alla Norma batch, this couscous salad’s tangy, herby and cheesy. It's super easy to make for a speedy dinner or lunch.

method.description: Make the Aubergine Alla Norma batch recipe.
Bring a saucepan of salted water to the boil. Add the giant couscous and cook according to the pack instructions. Drain, then rinse under cold water until cool.
Meanwhile, pick the basil leaves and tear them into bite-sized pieces.
Tip the cooked couscous into a bowl with the aubergine alla norma. Season with salt and black pepper, then splash in some balsamic vinegar to taste.
Fold through the rocket and basil, then spoon onto plates. Crumble over the feta and finish with a drizzle of olive oil.

chefs.name: Chloe René
chefs.summary: Chloe (@chlo_eat) takes inspiration from her diverse upbringing to create recipes and dishes influenced from cultures around the world. Despite her classical training, Chloe's philosophy in the kitchen revolves around simplicity and home-cooking. She firmly believes that the essence of a great meal lies in the quality of ingredients and the care put into their preparation. Instead of relying on complex and technical processes, Chloe prizes the art of letting ingredients shine through, enhancing their natural flavours with a delicate touch.
